_comment: Retry policy for LLM agent calls — applies whenever Vertex AI Gemini returns RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED (HTTP 429). Wraps the Fundamental, News, and Strategist agents via src/agents/llm_retry.py::RetryingAgentWrapper. base_delay and max_delay are the bounds of an exponential-with-jitter backoff; max_attempts is the total number of tries (not the number of retries after the first failure).
